name: Fouetté
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Active DMG is increased by an amount equal to the wielder's ATK ×[StateArg3]%. After playing or discarding 1 of the wielder's Command Cards, deal DMG equal to the wielder's ATK ×[StateArg1]% as {Poison} to a random enemy once. After the {Ultra Round} ends, there is a [StateArg2]% chance to trigger 100% {Poison} on all enemies.
